channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Content creators respond to TikTok's uncertain future in the US
item.description: TikTok content creators who make a living promoting their businesses and personal brands on the app were afraid that they would have to find new ways to engage consumers and make money as the app’s future in the United States remained uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Tech titans bend the knee to Trump
item.description: President-elect Trump’s inauguration will bring together some of the country’s most prominent technology leaders this week, underscoring the results of a months-long push by the industry to reconcile with the incoming president.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: TikTok app restored in US amid Trump assurances
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump plans to help the popular social media app TikTok stay in operation under his presidency.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: How TikTok grew from a fun app for teens into a potential national security threat
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — If it feels like TikTok has been around forever, that's probably because it has, at least if you're measuring via internet time.
item.dc:creator: DAVID HAMILTON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Alabama refuge is a paradise for birders and thousands of migrating sandhill cranes
item.description: Flooded cornfields near the Tennessee River in northern Alabama are a paradise for birders who flock to see tens of thousands of migrating sandhill cranes every winter.
item.dc:creator: Kristin M. Hall, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: TikTok no longer accessible in US
item.description: TikTok blocked access to American users late Saturday night, just hours before a law banning the popular video-sharing platform was set to go into effect. “A law banning TikTok has been enacted in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Cell Phone Bans in Schools: A Growing Trend Across the US
item.description: New York and New Jersey consider statewide bans, joining eight other states in restricting cell phones in schools, citing cyberbullying and decreased student focus as concerns.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg says Apple hasn’t innovated since the iPhone. He’s forgetting about this one major thing
item.description: Last week, as part of his apparent ongoing campaign to rebrand himself as a more Musk-like figure, Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg sat down with Joe Rogan for a three-hour discussion about free speech, government “censorship,” and how important it is that American companies win the AI race.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: For TikTok users, mourning, frustration and clinging to hope as TikTok ban looms
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The U.S. is inching closer and closer to a potential TikTok ban — with the nation's highest court upholding a law that's set to halt new downloads of the app starting Sunday.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS and MAE ANDERSON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Who could buy TikTok? Only a few parties are serious about offering
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The supremely popular TikTok could be banned on Jan. 19 under a federal law that forces the video sharing platform to divest itself from its China-based parent company, ByteDance, or shut down its U.S. operations.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 5 ways to avoid AI in Windows
item.description: Generative AI (genAI) is seemingly everywhere these days — and Windows is certainly no exception. The OS itself now has Copilot on its taskbar, and new PCs ship with a dedicated Copilot AI key on their keyboards.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg will cohost reception with Republican billionaires for Trump inauguration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is cohosting a reception with billionaire Republican donors next week for Donald Trump’s inauguration, the latest sign of the Facebook founder's embrace of the president-elect.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Court lets Tennessee porn site age verification law take effect as Texas law goes to Supreme Court
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — A panel of appeals judges has ruled that Tennessee can begin enforcing a law that requires pornographic websites to verify their visitors’ age as the First Amendment debate rises to the U.S. Supreme Court this week for oral arguments over a similar Texas law.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Technology executives on the move at Education, OPM, HHS
item.description: Steve Hernandez, Education’s CISO, and Brian Bordelon, Education’s deputy CIO, have moved to new agencies to take on similar roles. The post Technology executives on the move at Education, OPM, HHS first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: US TikTok users flock to Chinese app Xiaohongshu in protest with TikTok ban looming
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — As the threat of a TikTok ban looms, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Hackers claim massive breach of company that tracks and sells Americans' location data
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reveals that hackers stole data from Gravy Analytics, a major seller of smartphone location data to the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: HPE Aruba targets retailers with IoT, edge computing launches
item.description: HPE Aruba Networking has rolled out a variety of new products for retailers that are aimed at boosting connectivity for in-store and IoT networks, improving analytics, and streamlining management.
item.dc:creator: Network World
